message:
style: reformat cfg attribute layout in demo-showcase main.rs

Adjust #[cfg(...)] attribute formatting for the crossterm-compat
fallback and the no-backend error block. The crossterm-compat guard
is expanded to multi-line for clarity, while the no-backend guard is
collapsed to a single line to stay within line-length limits. No
logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
